items.summary: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands into the username parameter. Injected commands are executed with root privileges.

items.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to access files on the underlying system that could be manipulated to access an underlying account.

items.title: Apple Multiple Products Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
items.summary: Apple Safari, iOS, watchOS, visionOS, iPadOS, macOS, and tvOS contain a buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow the processing of maliciously crafted web content which may lead to memory corruption.

items.title: A 32-Year-Old Bug Walks Into A Telnet Server (GNU inetutils Telnetd CVE-2026-32746 Pre-Auth RCE)
items.summary: A long, long time ago, in a land free of binary exploit mitigations, when Unix still roamed the Earth, there lived a pre-authentication Telnetd vulnerability. In fact, this vulnerability was born so long ago (way back in 1994) that it may e…

items.title: Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) Software and Cisco Security Cloud Control (SCC) Firewall Management Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
items.summary: Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) Software and Cisco Security Cloud Control (SCC) Firewall Management contain a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in the web-based management interface that could allow an unauthenti…

items.title: The Most Organized Threat Actors Use Your ITSM (BMC FootPrints Pre-Auth Remote Code Execution Chains)
items.summary: SolarWinds. Ivanti. SysAid. ManageEngine. Giants of the KEV world, all of whom have ITSM side-projects. ITSMs, as a group of solutions, have played pivotal roles in numerous ransomware gang campaigns - not only do they represent code runnin…

items.title: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability
items.summary: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Classic UI where attackers could abuse Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) @import directives in email HTML.

items.title: Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
items.summary: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

items.title: Wing FTP Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability
items.summary: Wing FTP Server contains a generation of error message containing sensitive information vulnerability when using a long value in the UID cookie.

items.title: Google Chromium V8 Improper Restriction of Operations Within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer Vulnerability
items.summary: Google Chromium V8 contains an improper restriction of operations within the bounds of a memory buffer vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability c…

items.title: Google Skia Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
items.summary: Google Skia contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to perform out of bounds memory access via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability affects Google Chrome and ChromeOS, Android, Flutter, and possib…

items.title: Inside the benchmark: app architectures, walkthroughs of findings, and what each scanner actually caught
items.summary: This is Part 2 of our vibe coding security benchmark study. In Part 1, we compared how LLM-based security tools like ProjectDiscovery's Neo and Claude Code performed against traditional SAST and DAST scanners on AI-generated code. We found…

items.title: n8n Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources Vulnerability
items.summary: n8n contains an improper control of dynamically managed code resources vulnerability in its workflow expression evaluation system that allows for remote code execution.

items.title: Omnissa Workspace ONE Server-Side Request Forgery
items.summary: Omnissa Workspace One UEM formerly known as VMware Workspace One UEM contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could allow a malicious actor with network access to UEM to send their requests without authentication and…

items.title: SolarWinds Web Help Desk Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
items.summary: SolarWinds Web Help Desk contain a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in AjaxProxy that could allow an attacker to run commands on the host machine.

items.title: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) contains an authentication bypass using an alternate path or channel vulnerability that could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to leak specific stored credential data.

items.title: On the Effectiveness of Mutational Grammar Fuzzing
items.summary: Mutational grammar fuzzing is a fuzzing technique in which the fuzzer uses a predefined grammar that describes the structure of the samples. When a sample gets mutated, the mutations happen in such a way that any resulting samples still adh…

items.title: Hikvision Multiple Products Improper Authentication Vulnerability
items.summary: Multiple Hikvision products contain an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow a malicious user to escalate privileges on the system and gain access to sensitive information.

items.title: Rockwell Multiple Products Insufficient Protected Credentials Vulnerability
items.summary: Multiple Rockwell products contain an insufficient protected credentials vulnerability. Studio 5000 Logix Designer software may allow a key to be discovered. This key is used to verify Logix controllers are communicating with Rockwell Autom…

items.title: Apple Multiple products Use-After-Free Vulnerability
items.summary: Apple macOS, iOS, iPadOS, and Safari 16.6 contain a use-after-free vulnerability due to the processing of maliciously crafted web content that may lead to memory corruption.

items.title: Apple Multiple Products Integer Overflow or Wraparound Vulnerability
items.summary: Apple tvOS, macOS, Safari, iPadOS and watchOS contain an integer overflow or wraparound vulnerability due to the processing of maliciously crafted web content that may lead to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Apple iOS and iPadOS Use-After-Free Vulnerability
items.summary: Apple iOS and iPadOS contain a use-after-free vulnerability. An app may be able to execute arbitrary code with kernel privileges.

items.title: How Neo found an SSRF vulnerability in Faraday, and why it matters for every team that ships code
items.summary: Executive Summary Neo found a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Faraday, a widely used HTTP client library in the Ruby ecosystem. This is Neo’s first credited CVE discovery. Neo is ProjectDiscovery’s AI security copilot fo…
